title: OFF: All Of Era
description: A fully progression-based modpack that spans every era — from primitive survival and ancient magic to medieval kingdoms, industrial technology, and futuristic space exploration. Build, evolve, conquer, and shape history through the ages.
body:
![newbanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5079fa4bca2e26be6c06b0a80628db98c874c0ec.png)

------------------------------------------------

## **⛰️ The Primordial Shatter and the Cycle of Ages**

In the beginning, there was only the Void—no stars, no stone, no fire, no soul. From its silent depths emerged three primordial beings: Mother Earth, the Fire-Breather, and the Time Weaver. Together, they shaped the world. Mother Earth molded the first mountains and valleys, the Fire-Breather exhaled the sun and molten rivers, and the Time Weaver forged the first hourglass to guide the flow of eras.

## **The Age of Stone – The Awakening**

In the first era, the world was young and untamed. Towering cliffs and boundless forests ruled the land. The first humans and the first monsters walked side by side. Fire was newly discovered, and tools were carved from rough stone. In those days, spirits spoke in whispers and guided the living.

## **Rise of the Ancients**

As the sands of the hourglass fell into the second age, humans began shaping knowledge rather than stone. They built monumental structures and carved runes into the earth. Golem-kin, descendants of Mother Earth’s power, and ancient deep-dwelling creatures awakened. The first secrets of fire and magic were uncovered.

## **The Age of Iron and Blades**

The third era was an age of kingdoms and conquest. Iron spoke louder than words. Empires rose; armies marched. Dragons ruled the skies, and sorcerers guarded forgotten truths. Cities were fortified with high walls, and the mountains were pierced by mines. The Fire-Breather’s breath could still be felt in the heavens.

## **Steam, Gears, and Smoke**

As time advanced, magic and metal intertwined, heralding the fourth age. Steam-powered machines, early automatons, and mechanical citadels were forged. An uneasy alliance formed between mages and craftsmen. The whispers of nature slowly drowned beneath the clatter of gears.

## **Between Shadow and Steel**

In the fifth era, the sky dimmed under towering cities. Humanity reached upward with steel and knowledge. Science sought to replace sorcery, yet the old spirits never fully slept. The descendants of the golems merged with machines, and ancient ruins slumbered beneath the earth, waiting.

## **The Starsong Era**

In the final age, the world was no longer enough. The last grains fell from the Time Weaver's hourglass, opening pathways among the stars. Dimensional gates, astral vessels, and cosmic entities emerged. Yet the voice of Mother Earth still echoed:
“When the world ends, the ages begin anew.”

## **The Cycle Closes, Then Starts Again**

Legend says every age rises from the ashes of the last. Some civilizations reach the stars; others fall back to stone and flame. But whoever shatters the cycle or forges a new one is named The Fatecarver, etched into the Time Weaver's eternal tome.

**_Perhaps that one… is you._**
